nasb.text: the sons of Shephatiah, the sons of Hattil, the sons of Pochereth-hazzebaim, the sons of Ami.

esv.text: the sons of Shephatiah, the sons of Hattil, the sons of Pochereth-hazzebaim, and the sons of Ami.

cnv.text: 示法提雅的子孫、哈替的子孫、玻黑列．哈斯巴音的子孫和亞米的子孫。

ccb.text: 示法提雅的子孙、哈替的子孙、玻黑列·哈斯巴音的子孙和亚米的子孙。
